title: Software Update - Tapping on "Software Update"  button on Home Screen opens Software Update tab in Device Settings
scenario: Tapping "Software Update" on Home Screen opens the Software Update tab in Device Settings showing all device components.
steps: 1. Tap the 'Software Update' button on the Home Screen.
expected: The Software Update tab in Device Settings opens, displaying all device components (Headset/Earbuds and Charge Case/Charge Stand if applicable).
